ddls:
CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "char_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character image */,
  "letter" TEXT /* The letter represented by the character image */,
  "xbox" INTEGER /* X-coordinate of the top-left corner of the bounding box */,
  "ybox" INTEGER /* Y-coordinate of the top-left corner of the bounding box */,
  "width" INTEGER /* Width of the bounding box */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the bounding box */,
  "onpix" INTEGER /* Number of on-pixels in the character image */,
  "xbar" INTEGER /* X-coordinate of the horizontal bar position */,
  "ybar" INTEGER /* Y-coordinate of the vertical bar position */,
  "character_class" TEXT /* Class of the character (e.g., alphanumeric, symbol) */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the character recognition model */,
  "prediction_probability" REAL /* Probability of the predicted character */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("char_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of metadata */,
  "char_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character image the metadata belongs to */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the character image */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the image file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the image (e.g., scanned document, digital form) */,
  "image_format" TEXT /* Format of the image (e.g., PNG, JPEG, TIFF) */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the image (e.g., 1024x768) */,
  "dpi" INTEGER /* Dots per inch (DPI) of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_metadata_char_id FOREIGN KEY ("char_id") REFERENCES characters ("char_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data entry, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "char_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character image being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the character image */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the character image was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "access_duration" REAL /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_char_id FOREIGN KEY ("char_id") REFERENCES characters ("char_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character recognition model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the character recognition model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the character recognition model (e.g., CNN, RNN) */,
  "model_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the character recognition model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the character recognition model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_training_data" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character recognition model being trained */,
  "char_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character image used for training */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date when the training occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_training_data_char_id FOREIGN KEY ("char_id") REFERENCES characters ("char_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_training_data_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES character_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_testing_data" (
  "testing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each testing event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character recognition model being tested */,
  "char_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character image used for testing */,
  "testing_date" TEXT /* Date when the testing occurred */,
  "testing_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the character recognition model during testing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("testing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_testing_data_char_id FOREIGN KEY ("char_id") REFERENCES characters ("char_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_testing_data_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES character_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "char_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character image being annotated */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date when the annotation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_annotations_char_id FOREIGN KEY ("char_id") REFERENCES characters ("char_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration */,
  "config_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration */,
  "config_description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id")
)
